title: Tempad
description: Create a portal to anywhere from anywhere
body:
![Tempad 3.0.0 with new blocks, items and more!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664b01058c20fdc19d4fef353f986b90249ff89e.png)

# Tempad
Tempad is a Minecraft mod inspired by Marvel’s Loki, providing players with immersive teleportation mechanics through various intuitive and thematic items.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h1jfwP4vE84" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features:
Timedoor Projector & Marker: Set teleport locations and easily travel between points using Timedoors.

- Card Wallet: Conveniently store and manage location cards.

- Time Twister: Return to previous locations effortlessly.

- Location Broadcaster & Screening Device: Allow other players to teleport directly to you, with advanced filtering capabilities.

- Knowledge Projector: Comprehensive in-game documentation accessible directly within Minecraft.

- Workstation: A block-form variant of the portable Tempad.

- Metronome: Block-form device for powering teleportation mechanics.

Compatibility:
- Cadmus: Disable Timedoors on claimed territories.

- Argonauts & FTB Teams: Filter teleportation options by guild, party, or teammates.

- Jade: Enhanced HUD displaying additional block and Timedoor information.

- Dark Mode Everywhere: Improved visibility with fully supported dark mode interfaces.

- Curios: Items can be placed into dedicated Curios slots and visibly rendered on the player.

Special Thanks:
- Facu for creating all block textures.

- Shrimp for designing the item models and textures.

- ArcanePigeon for crafting the mod’s GUI elements.

- The dedicated Tempad Testers, especially RoboNebi, who significantly contributed to bug fixes and wrote extensive in-game documentation.

For All Time! Always!
